arabic: وَفِي رِوَايَةٍ لِلْبُخَارِيِّ : { فَلْيُتِمَّ , ثُمَّ يُسَلِّمْ , ثُمَّ يَسْجُدْ }  .‏  1‏‏1 ‏- صحيح .‏ رواه البخاري ( 1 /504 / فتح )‏ .‏

english.narrator: And in the narration of al-Bukhari:
english.text: 'he should complete (the prayer) then he should say Taslim and then perform the prostration'.
